spec.name: A Small Path In The Deep, Dark Forest
spec.description: You are on a narrow path leading through the deep, dark forest. Giant, grey trees loom ominously on all sides. The path continues east and south.

east.description: The narrow path winds its way through the trees to the east.

south.description: The narrow path winds its way through the trees to the south.

extra_descs.description: The ancient grey giants seem to observe you silently.
The path seems all too frail. One of the giant roots could probably crush it in a single blow.
